policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-amg-06 - Disable SMTP'. For more information, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Azure+Monitor#IncidentremediationAzureMonitor-drcp-amg-06 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Azure Monitor Managed Grafana Disable SMTP
policyDefinition.description: This policy ensures that SMTP configuration is disallowed in Managed Grafana. Users can use the DRCP Azure Monitor action group for alerting.

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
